title: Backfill couponConsumedAt for existing transactions with consumed coupons
body: The issue notes existing transactions with consumed coupons have no couponConsumedAt set. The fix accepts a small re-increment risk during rollout window. A future backfill job could check for an existing coupon-usages row before re-incrementing to avoid double-counting on the first post-fix retry.
rationale: Without backfill, a retried webhook for a pre-existing consumed coupon could double-increment usesCount if the coupon-usages row check isn't added.
